content: Set up project foundation: pnpm init, install all dependencies (React 19, Vite, Express, tRPC, Drizzle, Anthropic, Tailwind 4, shadcn)
Create database schema (Drizzle ORM) + tRPC router with posts.generate, posts.regenerate, video.analyzeVideo, image.generateImage
Build frontend: PostBuilder main page, PostCard component, HistoryPanel modal with full platform/model/video support
Integrate Claude API: multi-model post generation, video frame analysis, structured JSON schema output, image generation stub
Write Vitest tests for platform configs, character limits, post generation, video analysis, metadata extraction
Create minimal README + LICENSE, commit everything, push to GitHub
